instruction: The yellow sparkle on the airplay icon has slipped out of place. Move it back to its original position. (very subtle — only 2px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/airplay.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 17H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v10a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-1"/><polygon points="12 15 17 21 7 21 12 15"/></g>
  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="18,62 22,58 26,62 22,66 18,62" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/airplay.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 17H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v10a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-1"/><polygon points="12 15 17 21 7 21 12 15"/></g>
  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="20,64 24,60 28,64 24,68 20,64" />
</svg>
